Use: Merge the Abyssal Flame with the Primordial Flame.

Races: Human, Dwarf, Night Elf, Gnome, High Elf
"An enchanted compendium that empowers mages to create portals leading to the city of Theramore, fostering swift transportation for allies and friends."
Races: Orc, Undead, Tauren, Troll, Goblin
"Unleashing the arcane essence contained within, this tome enables mages to conjure portals that transport them and their companions to the stronghold of Stonard, deep within the Swamp of Sorrows."
Use: Permanently adds 40 armor penetration to a leg or head slot item. Does not stack with other enchantments for the selected equipment slot.

Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
